title: lithocarpus corneri
intro: Lithocarpus corneri, also known as the Corner's Lithocarpus, is a plant species in the beech family (Fagaceae) native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus corneri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Lithocarpus corneri is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
